headline.zh-CN: 修复曲目重提与固定评审流程
headline.en: Fixes track resubmission and fixed-review flows

summary.zh-CN: 可重新提交的退稿现在能在曲目详情页直接上传新源音频；固定评审允许主催参与同行评审，并修复终审退回母带后的批准状态重置。
summary.en: Resubmittable rejected tracks can now upload a new source from the detail page. Fixed reviews can include the producer, and final-review returns to mastering now reset approval state correctly.

title.zh-CN: 可重提退稿有了上传入口
title.en: Resubmittable rejections now have an upload entry

description.zh-CN: 当曲目被拒绝但允许重新提交时，曲师可以直接在曲目详情页选择新源音频并回到接收审核阶段。
description.en: When a track is rejected with resubmission allowed, the submitter can choose a new source file from the detail page and return the track to intake.

title.zh-CN: 固定评审支持主催参与

description.zh-CN: 固定评审池现在可以包含主催；系统会按评审分配记录判断权限和计数，提交者本人仍会被排除。
description.en: Fixed reviewer pools can include the producer. Permissions and counts follow assignment records, while the track submitter remains excluded.

title.zh-CN: 终审退回母带重置批准状态

description.zh-CN: 终审退回母带后仍停留在同一工作流轮次内，但会清空当前母带的终审批准状态，后续母带版本继续按交付编号递增。
description.en: Returning from final review to mastering stays in the same workflow cycle, clears current master approval state, and keeps later master versions numbered within that cycle.
